node.text:
"Football is a team sport so it's important we all come together and work as a team." ​

Football lives at the heart of nearly every village, town, city and country across the world. It's the game that brings people together like no other.​

@timowerner is teaming up with @adidasfootball and @commongoalorg to enable equitable access to football by pledging 1% of his salary to support @streetleagueuk 

#adidasFootballCollective

“Our cultures are vastly different yet we come together for the LOVE of fútbol” ​ 
 
Beyond the city limits of Los Angeles, Supporters carry a sense of pride for their Countries, Values and Traditions. ​ 

Today, LA rivals @LAGalaxy & @LAFC meet for their first inter-city contest of the year. It’s not just a game, but LIFE! ​

node.text:
News just in from @manutdwomen, where the club’s social media team has confirmed not seeing a single piece of negative commentary on players’ social media accounts.

The reason behind the sudden absence of trolls is unknown. However, the squad are encouraged by the prospect of talking about what counts... the football. 

#ChangeTheGame #Football #Soccer #adidasFootball

node.text:
Community. 

It’s what makes football more than just a sport. It’s what makes the ‘beautiful game’, beautiful.

From Mexico City, to all four corners of the globe — we are all connected by something greater.

That’s why adidas Football is pledging 1% of global football sales to Common Goal, so together we can help organisations like @futbolmasmexico scale its impact and positively transform more lives through sport. 

#adidasFootballCollective #CommonGoal #Football #Soccer #adidasFootball

node.text:
Imagine a future where players like @marcelotwelve and @wendie_Renard aren’t able to rise.​

​Grassroots football is under threat - and there won’t be any #UCL or #UWCL football without it.

​Together with @championsleague and @wchampionsleague, we’re taking action to help protect your game. ​

​Click the link in our bio to find out more.​

​#Football #Soccer #adidasFootball #adidasFootballCollective
